title: TestLab UX: phase color inconsistency + display fixes
description:
UX review findings batch 1:
1. Phase colors inconsistent between PhasePipeline (TEST=blue) and ActivityStream (TEST=amber) — unify mapping
2. Result abbreviations '3P 1F 2X' unclear (X=Fixed?) — use full words
3. Idle timer shows 00:00 instead of last run duration
4. Activity Stream empty state lacks guidance text
5. Multiple lists use index as React key — causes DOM recycling bugs with SSE pushes
